EducationalLoan - Class in com.fincredit.model
Class representing an educational loan product, extending the LoanProduct class and providing specific details such as base interest rate, maximum term, and description for student and academic financing.
EducationalLoan() - Constructor for class com.fincredit.model.EducationalLoan
 
evaluate(Client, double) - Method in interface com.fincredit.interfaces.IEvaluable
 
evaluate(Client, double) - Method in class com.fincredit.logic.CreditEvaluator
Evaluates a client's creditworthiness based on their maximum payment capacity and monthly income.
EvaluationResult - Class in com.fincredit.model
Class representing the result of a loan evaluation, including approval status, monthly payment, maximum payment capacity, payment ratio, reason for decision, and evaluator's name.
EvaluationResult(boolean, double, double, double, String, String) - Constructor for class com.fincredit.model.EvaluationResult
